column_values.value:
{"text":"HOOK 1:
Woman: "You actually look... years younger. What's your secret? Did you finally start sleeping?"
Man: "Not quite."
Woman: "Is it your makeup? Did you do something to your hair?"

HOOK 2: 
Woman: "Okay, I give up. What did you do to make your skin look so... *smooth*? No new haircut, no new job, so what is it?"
Man: "Not quite."

items.name: Anti-Gray Serum | META | MOTION | Science of Gray

column_values.text: Anton Shpakovskiy, Aviad Eilam, Tom Tabaritzi, Lilian Krumholz

column_values.value: {"text":"Concept Summary: A fast-paced, animated explainer that dives into the science behind Particle's Anti-Gray Serum, demystifying how it naturally restores hair color + UGC content & transformations","changed_at":"2025-05-27T11:34:58.703Z"}
column_values.text: Concept Summary: A fast-paced, animated explainer that dives into the science behind Particle's Anti-Gray Serum, demystifying how it naturally restores hair color + UGC content & transformations

column_values.value:
{"text":"Inside your hair follicles, there's a pigment called melanin — it's what gives your hair its color.
Over time, your body produces less melanin... and boom — gray hair.
Particle's Anti-Gray Serum targets this exact process.
Powered by active peptides and catalase enzymes, it helps reactivate the natural production of pigment at the follicle level.
Think of it like giving your hair cells a wake-up call — restoring color from the root, without dyes or cover-ups.
And it’s not just cosmetic. It supports healthier, stronger hair while doing it.
Clinically-backed. Dermatologist-recommended. Real results in real men.
You won’t wake up black-haired overnight — but with daily use, you’ll notice the difference in weeks.
Thousands already have.
The science is clear. The gray doesn’t have to stay.
Try Particle Anti-Gray Serum today.","changed_at":"2025-05-27T11:34:58.704Z"}
column_values.text:
Inside your hair follicles, there's a pigment called melanin — it's what gives your hair its color.
Over time, your body produces less melanin... and boom — gray hair.
Particle's Anti-Gray Serum targets this exact process.
Powered by active peptides and catalase enzymes, it helps reactivate the natural production of pigment at the follicle level.
Think of it like giving your hair cells a wake-up call — restoring color from the root, without dyes or cover-ups.
And it’s not just cosmetic. It supports healthier, stronger hair while doing it.
Clinically-backed. Dermatologist-recommended. Real results in real men.
You won’t wake up black-haired overnight — but with daily use, you’ll notice the difference in weeks.
Thousands already have.
The science is clear. The gray doesn’t have to stay.
Try Particle Anti-Gray Serum today.

column_values.value: "Going gray isn’t just aging — it’s biology"
column_values.text: Going gray isn’t just aging — it’s biology

items.name: Anti Gray Serum | Meta | Claude | Split Screen: Box Dye vs. AGS Contrast

column_values.text: Aviad Eilam, Tom Tabaritzi, Anton Shpakovskiy, Lilian Krumholz

column_values.value: {"text":"Horizontal split screen. Top panel: guy (cast 40s) in bathroom struggling with box dye — gloves on, stained fingers, checking the clock, messy sink. Bottom panel: second guy (cast 40s) spraying AGS onto gray temples, calm, clean, done in seconds. Both panels run simultaneously so the contrast is immediate. Midway, top panel guy is still waiting with dye on his hair while bottom panel guy is already styled and walking out. End: bottom panel guy looks into camera, text overlay \"Not a dye. A pigment restorer.\""}
column_values.text: Horizontal split screen. Top panel: guy (cast 40s) in bathroom struggling with box dye — gloves on, stained fingers, checking the clock, messy sink. Bottom panel: second guy (cast 40s) spraying AGS onto gray temples, calm, clean, done in seconds. Both panels run simultaneously so the contrast is immediate. Midway, top panel guy is still waiting with dye on his hair while bottom panel guy is already styled and walking out. End: bottom panel guy looks into camera, text overlay "Not a dye. A pigment restorer."

column_values.value:
{"text":"Script A:
(0–3s) Split screen opens. Top: rubber gloves, box dye. Bottom: AGS bottle, clean hands.
(3–8s) Top: applying dye, mess on counter, timer set for 30 minutes. Bottom: three sprays on temples, done.
(8–15s) Top: still waiting, checking mirror anxiously. Bottom: styled, heading out the door.
(15–18s) Bottom panel takes over full screen. Product shot. "Not a dye. A pigment restorer." Free shipping + guarantee + CTA."}
column_values.text:
Script A:
(0–3s) Split screen opens. Top: rubber gloves, box dye. Bottom: AGS bottle, clean hands.
(3–8s) Top: applying dye, mess on counter, timer set for 30 minutes. Bottom: three sprays on temples, done.
(8–15s) Top: still waiting, checking mirror anxiously. Bottom: styled, heading out the door.
(15–18s) Bottom panel takes over full screen. Product shot. "Not a dye. A pigment restorer." Free shipping + guarantee + CTA.

items.name: Sunscreen | Meta | Claude | Sun Damage Is Permanent — Undo vs. Prevent

column_values.text: Aviad Eilam, Tom Tabaritzi, Anton Shpakovskiy, Lilian Krumholz

column_values.value: {"text":"A calm, authoritative VO-driven motion graphics ad that reframes sunscreen as the foundational step that makes every other grooming product work. The core tension: men are spending money to repair damage the sun is freely inflicting every day — Face Shield is the missing first step."}
column_values.text: A calm, authoritative VO-driven motion graphics ad that reframes sunscreen as the foundational step that makes every other grooming product work. The core tension: men are spending money to repair damage the sun is freely inflicting every day — Face Shield is the missing first step.

column_values.value:
{"text":"Every product you're using to fight dark spots, wrinkles, and eye bags — the sun is working against all of it. Every single day.

UV exposure is the number one cause of visible aging in men. Not genetics. Not stress. The sun. And it doesn't matter how good your Face Cream is if you're walking outside unprotected. You're repairing at night what you're breaking every morning.

The reason most men skip sunscreen isn't laziness. It's that every formula they've tried was built for someone else. White residue that sits on your skin. Greasy film that wrecks your whole look. Visible cast that makes it obvious.

Particle Face Shield was engineered for men who actually have to leave the house. Transparent formula. Lightweight feel. Broad-spectrum SPF protection that disappears the second you apply it. No white marks. No shine. No one knows you're wearing it — they just notice your skin looks better.

Over a million men have upgraded their routine with Particle. Face Shield is the step most of them wish they'd added first.

You wouldn't spend money fixing your car and then leave it out in a hailstorm. Stop spending on repair and skipping protection. Try Face Shield free for 30 days — if it's not the best sunscreen you've ever worn, send it back. Free shipping. No risk. particleformen.com"}
column_values.text:
Every product you're using to fight dark spots, wrinkles, and eye bags — the sun is working against all of it. Every single day.

UV exposure is the number one cause of visible aging in men. Not genetics. Not stress. The sun. And it doesn't matter how good your Face Cream is if you're walking outside unprotected. You're repairing at night what you're breaking every morning.

The reason most men skip sunscreen isn't laziness. It's that every formula they've tried was built for someone else. White residue that sits on your skin. Greasy film that wrecks your whole look. Visible cast that makes it obvious.

Particle Face Shield was engineered for men who actually have to leave the house. Transparent formula. Lightweight feel. Broad-spectrum SPF protection that disappears the second you apply it. No white marks. No shine. No one knows you're wearing it — they just notice your skin looks better.

Over a million men have upgraded their routine with Particle. Face Shield is the step most of them wish they'd added first.

You wouldn't spend money fixing your car and then leave it out in a hailstorm. Stop spending on repair and skipping protection. Try Face Shield free for 30 days — if it's not the best sunscreen you've ever worn, send it back. Free shipping. No risk. particleformen.com

column_values.value: "You're spending $69 to fix what the sun breaks for free."
